notes: U.S. & Canada Redfin real estate data. Page size set by num_homes (default 40, up to 350). Search results live at data.results; pagination via page param, data.has_more signals more pages. rapidapi_host is best-effort (could not verify on RapidAPI). subscribe_api_id is set because the dev-portal keys this API as 'redfin_api' (not the realtime_redfin_data convention), so self-subscribe must use that id; portal_api_id stays real_time_redfin_data for the api.openwebninja.com URL slug.
